person?

Steps for meeting between client and person
who they blame or who hurt them
В—пӮ— 	Acknowledge courage and love of both for being present
В—пӮ— 	Explain importance of finding truth
В—пӮ— 	Healing of hearing each persons words and intentions
which may have been misunderstood
В—пӮ— 	Remind both parties of value of actions over course of
relationship not only incidence which created breaking
of trust or communication

В—пӮ— 	What word do you hear when the client tells their story.

В—пӮ— 	What family member could you invite to a session to
help your client get to the truth?
В—пӮ— 	As a coach do you also need the truth?

Redo of a conversation which hurts
В—пӮ— 	State what you want at a soul level
вҖңI want you to know I deeply love you and am here for
youвҖқ
Consider what you needed when you said the hurtful
words
вҖңI was looking to feel important or rightвҖқ
вҖңWhat matters most to me is that I love you and that you
feel that love. I should have explained my feelings in this
wayвҖҰвҖқ Or вҖңI will think about how what I said was not what
I meant and come to you later with the truth.вҖқ
